API docs by Redocly

Trustap API (0.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

E-mail: support@trustap.com

The Trustap API is a REST-based API for managing user data and transactions for Trustap users.

Note that, like Stripe, all API price and charge fields expect amounts to be provided in a currency's smallest unit. See the Stripe documentation for more details.

API Keys

Some endpoints such as /charge endpoints can be accessed directly using an API key. API keys are provided as the "username" portion of a basic auth authentication. For example, the Trustap fee for a new online transaction can be determined using the following cURL request with an API key:

curl -u '<api_key>': 'https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/charge?currency=eur&price=1234'

Deprecation

Deprecated endpoints are tagged with the word DEPRECATED at the start of their description. The deprecation message will describe what endpoints/approach should be used instead.

Note that deprecated endpoints will not be removed from the current version of the API, but their use is discouraged. Furthermore, migrating to later major versions of the API will be made easier by avoiding deprecated endpoints.

Production

This documentation references the staging environment of the Trustap API, which is available at https://dev.stage.trustap.com and uses the trustap-stage realm during authentication. This environment can be used for implementing and testing features using test credit cards, bank accounts, etc.

When all features using Trustap have been implemented and tested sufficiently, the production environment of the Trustap API can be used to process actual currency. This environment is available at https://dev.trustap.com and uses the trustap realm during authentication.

Note that only your client ID will be the same in the staging and production Trustap API environments; your client secret and API key will be different in the two environments.

API Keys

Deprecation

Production

The Trustap API is a REST-based API for managing user data and transactions for Trustap users.

Note that, like Stripe, all API price and charge fields expect amounts to be provided in a currency's smallest unit. See the Stripe documentation for more details.

API Keys

Some endpoints such as /charge endpoints can be accessed directly using an API key. API keys are provided as the "username" portion of a basic auth authentication. For example, the Trustap fee for a new online transaction can be determined using the following cURL request with an API key:

curl -u '<api_key>': 'https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/charge?currency=eur&price=1234'

Deprecation

Deprecated endpoints are tagged with the word DEPRECATED at the start of their description. The deprecation message will describe what endpoints/approach should be used instead.

Note that deprecated endpoints will not be removed from the current version of the API, but their use is discouraged. Furthermore, migrating to later major versions of the API will be made easier by avoiding deprecated endpoints.

Production

This documentation references the staging environment of the Trustap API, which is available at https://dev.stage.trustap.com and uses the trustap-stage realm during authentication. This environment can be used for implementing and testing features using test credit cards, bank accounts, etc.

When all features using Trustap have been implemented and tested sufficiently, the production environment of the Trustap API can be used to process actual currency. This environment is available at https://dev.trustap.com and uses the trustap realm during authentication.

Note that only your client ID will be the same in the staging and production Trustap API environments; your client secret and API key will be different in the two environments.

Buyers and Sellers

Users represent users of the platform.

Create a new guest user

This endpoint creates guest user which can be used as the buyer or the seller. If guest user is used as the seller in a transaction, they need to be created with country_code parameter correctly set. This is important because of currencies they can use in their transactions. tos_acceptance is the parameter which is important for disputes/chargeback and represent the timestamp when Trustap ToS were accepted https://www.trustap.com/terms.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
country_code
string
email
required
string non-empty
first_name
required
string non-empty
last_name
required
string non-empty
required
object (users.TosAcceptance)

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/guest_users

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "country_code": "IE",
  • "email": "guest@test.com",
  • "first_name": "Test",
  • "last_name": "User",
  • "tos_acceptance": {
    • "ip": "192.168.1.2",
    • "unix_timestamp": 1672531200
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "1-feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232"
}

Get the balance for the current user in each currency

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/balances

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "available": [
    • {
      • "amount": 0,
      • "currency": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Get the status enabled/disabled of user's features

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/features

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instant_payouts_enabled": true
}

Allow users to turn instant payouts feature on/off

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
enabled
required
boolean

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/features/instant_payouts

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "enabled": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instant_payouts_enabled": true
}

Clients

Clients represent partner applications.

Get supported registration countries for the current client

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/client/supported_registration_countries

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • "string"
]

Personal

Personal endpoints are used for managing personal details for users, for "Know Your Customer" requirements.

Create an account session and retrieve the client secret for it

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/account_session

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "client_secret": "accs_secret__***********************************************"
}

Get debit account details

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/debit_account

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bank_account": {
    • "bank_name": "string",
    • "country": "string",
    • "currency_alpha_2": "string",
    • "last4": "string",
    • "routing": "string"
    },
  • "card": {
    • "last4": "string",
    • "month": 0,
    • "year": 0
    }
}

Set debit account details

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (personal.BankDetails)
bank_token
string
card_details
string
type
required
string
Enum: "bank" "bank_token" "card"

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/debit_account

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bank_details": {
    • "account_number": "string",
    • "country_code": "string",
    • "currency": "string",
    • "routing_number": "string"
    },
  • "bank_token": "string",
  • "card_details": "string",
  • "type": "bank"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bank_account": {
    • "bank_name": "string",
    • "country": "string",
    • "currency_alpha_2": "string",
    • "last4": "string",
    • "routing": "string"
    },
  • "card": {
    • "last4": "string",
    • "month": 0,
    • "year": 0
    }
}

Get instant payout balance

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/instant_payout_balance

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "amount": 0,
  • "currency": "string"
}

Get the payout attempts that have occurred for this account

Payout attempts are returned in reverse chronological order - the first attempt in the returned array will be the most recent payout attempt.

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/payout_attempts

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "amount": 0,
    • "arrival_date": 0,
    • "created_date": 0,
    • "failure_code": "account_closed",
    • "status": "paid"
    }
]

OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/personal/additional_identity_document/verification_status

Content type
application/json

  • "status": "verifying"
}

Set personal details for the local user

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
address_city
string
address_line1
string
address_line2
string
address_postal_code
string
address_state
string
object
id_number
string or null

The full ID number for this user.

name_first
string
name_last
string
object or null

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/personal/details

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "address_city": "string",
  • "address_line1": "string",

  • "address_state": "string",

    • "month": 0,

    },

  • "name_first": "string",
  • "name_last": "string",
  • "phone": {
    • "dial_code": "string",
    • "dial_code_country": "string",
    • "number": "string"
    }
}

OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/personal/identity_document/verification_status

application/json

Get the details for the Stripe publishable key the user is linked to

Returns the Publishable Key for the Stripe Platform which the user is linked to.

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/personal/stripe_publishable_key

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "publishable_key": "pk_xXxXxXxXxXx"
}

Get the status of a user's ability to accept payouts

This endpoint requires the user identified by the Trustap-User header to have granted the profile scope to the client that is performing the request. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the profile scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
header Parameters
Trustap-User
string

Required in client flows, where you make API calls on behalf of another Trustap user.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/profile/payout_status

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "verifying"
}

Add a new payout method to the current account using a payment method ID

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
payment_method_id
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/stripe_financial_connections/add_account

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "payment_method_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bank_account": {
    • "bank_name": "string",
    • "country": "string",
    • "currency_alpha_2": "string",
    • "last4": "string",
    • "routing": "string"
    },
  • "card": {
    • "last4": "string",
    • "month": 0,
    • "year": 0
    }
}

Get the ownership details from the given SetupIntent using Stripe Financial Connections

Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
setup_intent_id
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/stripe_financial_connections/ownership

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "raw_address": "string",
  • "raw_phone": "string"
}

Get a SetupIntent ID and secret for starting a Stripe Financial Connections session

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/stripe_financial_connections/prepare_account

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "setup_intent_client_secret": "string",
  • "setup_intent_id": "string"
}

Create verification method and message if not available

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/verification_method

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "not_available",
  • "verification_method": "stripe_identity"
}

Create verification session and retrieve client secret for it

Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the profile scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/verification_session

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "verification_session_client_secret": "vs_1P**********************_******_****_********************************************************************************0PVs"
}

Create verification session for native apps that use Stripe native SDK

Creates verification session for native apps that use Stripe native SDK, and returns it's Verification Session ID with appropriate Ephemeral Key. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the profile scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/verification_session_native

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ephemeral_key": "string",
  • "verification_session_id": "string"
}

Get verification status of the user

Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the profile scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/verification_status

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "verification_session_id": "vs_1PH0bmDnTEntFpTD2xDXZy9t",
  • "verification_session_status": "created"
}

Online Transactions

Online transactions are used when the goods are delivered using registered mail.

Get multiple online transactions by their IDs

This endpoint takes a required ids parameter that contains a comma-separated list of transaction IDs, and returns the transactions corresponding to those IDs. A maximum of 50 IDs may be provided, results are returned in the order specified in ids, and duplicates are preserved. Transactions that couldn't be found will be returned as null values in the result array. The following example request results in the 200 OK response described below, assuming that the transaction with ID 1990 couldn't be found:

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/batch/transactions?ids=1309,609,1990,609
Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
ids
required
string

A comma-separated list of transaction IDs

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/batch/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
    • "charge": 78,
    • "charge_seller": 0,
    • "client_id": "trustap-app",
    • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
    • "id": 1309,
    • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
    • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
    • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
    • "posta_hr_tracking": {
      • "barcode": "ABC12345",
      • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
      },
    • "price": 1234,
    • "quantity": 1,
    • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "status": "funds_released",
    • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
    • "tracking": {
      • "carrier": "ups",
      • "tracking_code": "***"
      }
    }
]

Get online transactions for the logged-in user

Transactions are currently sorted by ID.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
before_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return transactions that were created chronologically before the transaction with this ID

after_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return transactions that were created chronologically after the transaction with this ID (i.e. with smaller IDs)

limit
integer <int64> [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25

The maximum number of transactions to return

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "charge_seller": 0,
    • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "id": 1309,
    • "join_code": "54c5bb89-a5ea-4be7-ad7a-e740c2eebab4",
    • "price": 1234,
    • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "status": "created"
    },
  • {
    • "buyer_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "charge": 78,
    • "charge_seller": 0,
    • "created": "2018-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "id": 609,
    • "join_code": "c9cd6a9d-1096-4d38-b4aa-2c354beac845",
    • "price": 1234,
    • "status": "created"
    }
]

Create a new online transaction

A request to this endpoint must be preceded by a call to /charge with the price of the goods specified in price.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge
required
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>

The charge_calculator_version value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_seller
integer <int64>

The seller charge value returned from a request to /charge.

client_id
string
currency
required
string

The currency that the price is specified in.

description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

features
Array of strings (basic.Feature)
Items Enum: "require_seller_acceptance" "use_hr_post" "use_shippo"

features contains flags that modify the transaction flow.

price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

role
required
string (basic.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/transactions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "price": 1234,
  • "role": "seller"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Create a new online transaction with both users

This endpoint is an optimised call that allows a transaction to be created and joined in a single request. It requires the user identified by join_user_id to have granted the basic_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge
required
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>

The charge_calculator_version value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_seller
integer <int64>

The seller charge value returned from a request to /charge.

client_id
string
creator_role
required
string (basic.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"
currency
required
string

The currency that the price is specified in.

description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

features
Array of strings (basic.Feature)
Items Enum: "require_seller_acceptance" "use_hr_post" "use_shippo"

features contains flags that modify the transaction flow.

join_user_id
required
string

The user that will be joined to the new transaction when it is created. It cannot be the ID of the user making the request.

postage_fee
integer <int64>

The custom postage_fee for the transaction.

price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/transactions/create_and_join

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "creator_role": "seller",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "join_user_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "price": 1234,
  • "role": "seller"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Create a new online transaction with both users

This endpoint is an optimised call that allows a transaction to be created and joined in a single request. It requires the online user to have granted the basic_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request. This endpoint allows creating a transaction with both buyer and seller as guest or full users, or one party to be guest user and the other full user.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
buyer_id
required
string

The id of the buyer for this transaction (it can be full user id or guest user id).

charge
required
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>

The charge_calculator_version value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_seller
integer <int64>

The seller charge value returned from a request to /charge.

client_id
string
creator_role
required
string (basic.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"
currency
required
string (Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

features
Array of strings (basic.Feature)
Items Enum: "require_seller_acceptance" "use_hr_post" "use_shippo"

features contains flags that modify the transaction flow.

postage_fee
integer <int64>

The custom postage fee, this fee only applies in the case postage fee feature flag is enabled.

price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

seller_id
required
string

The id of the seller for this transaction (it can be full user id or guest user id).

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/transactions/create_with_guest_user

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "buyer_id": "1-bd5bb99j-95bf-87e2-ce0d-95e7541c6ad5",
    • "charge": 78,
    • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
    • "charge_seller": 0,
    • "creator_role": "seller",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "price": 1234,
    • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7"
    }
]

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

OAuth2
query Parameters
join_code

string

Join an online transaction using a join code

A transaction can't be joined using its ID, because only the buyer and seller of a transaction can access a transaction using its ID.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
join_code
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Reject an online transaction by its join code

A transaction can't be rejected using its ID, because only the buyer and seller of a transaction can access a transaction using its ID.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
join_code
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions-by-join-code/{join_code}/reject

  • 200
  • 400

application/json

  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,

    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },

  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",

  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}

    }
}

Allow this listing-based transaction to proceed

"Listing transactions" are transactions created from listings (using the /create_transaction endpoints for listings). Listings transactions for online transactions must be accepted by the creator of the listing using /accept_listing_transaction in order to proceed. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the basic_ls:offline_accept_listing scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/accept_listing_transaction

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Claim online transactions for sellers on behalf of the buyer

This endpoint allows a client's claim transactions for sellers on behalf of the buyer. It requires to have granted the basic_tx:offline_claim scope and API Key authentication. The endpoint is not accessible for guests and full users.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/claim_for_buyer

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Claim online transactions for sellers on behalf of the seller

This endpoint allows a client's claim transactions for sellers on behalf of the seller. It requires to have granted the basic_tx:offline_claim scope and API Key authentication. The endpoint is not accessible for guests and full users.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/claim_for_seller

Submit a detailed order issue for this online transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
description
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/submit_order_issue

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "description": "Delivery is delayed"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Claim for an online transaction as buyer given a claim secret

This endpoint allows a full user to claim for a transaction as buyer given a claim secret.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
secret
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions_by_claim_secret/{secret}/claim_as_buyer

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },

  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",

    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Online Payment

Get the Trustap fee for an online transaction

This returns the Trustap fee, in the currency's smallest unit, for a transaction involving goods with the supplied price. See the Stripe documentation for more details.

Authorizations:
OAuth2APIKey
query Parameters
currency
required
string

The currency that the price is specified in.

price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold in this transaction, in the currency's smallest unit. For example, if a trading card is being sold for $12.34 (with currency as usd), then the request for the charge for this transaction would be /charge?price=1234&currency=usd.

quantity
integer <int64>

When creating transactions from a multi-use listing, the quantity parameter can be provided in order to generate a charge for the given price multiplied by the given quantity. See /multi_use_listings/{listingId}/create_transaction for more details.

payment_method
string

The payment method that will be used to pay for the transaction. This is necessary because different payment methods may result in different fees.

The default value is card.

use_hr_post
boolean
postage_fee
integer <int64>

The custom postage_fee for the transaction.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/charge

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "currency": "eur"
}

Update the description, currency, price and/or charge of an online transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_seller
integer <int64>

The charge_seller value returned from a request to /charge.

currency
string
description
string

A description of the goods being sold.

price
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "price": 1234
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Enable the seller to accept payment for an online transaction

This endpoint lets the seller accept payment and is accessible only if the seller has granted a feature require_seller_acceptance. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the basic_tx:offline_accept_payment scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/accept_payment

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Enable payment acceptance for the seller using `Trustap-User` for an online transaction

This endpoint allows payment acceptance for the seller specified in the header as Trustap-User.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Trustap-User
string

Required in client flows, where you make API calls on behalf of another Trustap user.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/accept_payment_with_guest_seller

Get bank transfer details for an online transaction which payment method is `bank_transfer`

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/bank_transfer_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "amount": 0,
  • "currency": "string",
  • "financial_address": {
    • "aba": {
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_name": "string",
      • "routing_number": "string"
      },
    • "iban": {
      • "account_holder_name": "string",
      • "bic": "string",
      • "country": "string",
      • "iban": "string"
      },
    • "sort_code": {
      • "account_holder_name": "string",
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "sort_code": "string"
      },
    • "swift": {
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_name": "string",
      • "swift_code": "string"
      }
    },
  • "hosted_instructions_url": "string",
  • "reference": "string"
}

Get the Trustap fee for an online transaction

This returns the Trustap fee, in the currency's smallest unit, for a transaction involving goods with the supplied price. See the Stripe documentation for more details.

Authorizations:
OAuth2APIKey
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
query Parameters
price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold in this transaction, in the currency's smallest unit. For example, if a trading card is being sold for $12.34 (with currency as usd), then the request for the charge for this transaction would be /charge?price=1234&currency=usd.

quantity
integer <int64>

When creating transactions from a multi-use listing, the quantity parameter can be provided in order to generate a charge for the given price multiplied by the given quantity. See /multi_use_listings/{listingId}/create_transaction for more details.

payment_method
string

The payment method that will be used to pay for the transaction. This is necessary because different payment methods may result in different fees.

The default value is card.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/charge

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "currency": "eur"
}

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/pay_with_balance

  • 400

  • "currency": "eur",

  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",

    },

  • "status": "funds_released",

  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Set the payment method to be used for this online transaction

Different payment methods incur different rates, so the payment method to be used for a transaction must be set before the payment is made. This requires retrieving the charge associated with the payment method using GET /transactions/{transaction_id}/charge, and passing the generated charge as a parameter to this endpoint.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge
required
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /charge.

charge_seller
integer <int64>

The charge_seller value returned from a request to /charge.

currency
required
string
payment_method
string
price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/set_payment_method

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 0,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "currency": "string",
  • "payment_method": "string",
  • "price": 0
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Online Shipping

Get the list of facilities for a given carrier

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
carrier_id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
country_code
required
string

ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

delivery_type
required
string

The type of delivery or collection method we want to get options from. delivery_type can be one of the following:

  • parcel_locker
  • post_office
search_text
required
string

Filter text that is used to search available facilities. It can include City, Postal Code or a string contained within Facility name.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/carriers/{carrier_id}/facilities

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "country": "HR",
  • "delivery_type": "parcel_locker",
  • "search_text": "Zagreb"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "address": "123 Street 1 Zabreb, Croatia",
  • "city": "Zagreb",
  • "facility_type": "post_office",
  • "name": "Zagreb Main Office",
  • "postal_code": "123456HR"
}

Get the list of Shippo shipping rates available

This returns the list of Shippo shipping rates available for the addreses provided i.e sender's address and recipient's address.

Authorizations:
OAuth2APIKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
currency
required
string
customs_certify
boolean
customs_certify_signer
string
customs_description
string
customs_eel_pfc
string
customs_incoterm
string
customs_mass_unit
string
customs_net_weight
number <double>
customs_non_delivery_option
string
Enum: "return" "abandon"
customs_origin_country
string
customs_quantity
integer <int64>
customs_value_amount
string
customs_value_currency
string
parcel_distance_unit
required
string (basic.DistanceUnit)
Enum: "in" "cm"
parcel_height
required
number <double>
parcel_length
required
number <double>
parcel_mass_unit
required
string (basic.MassUnit)
Enum: "lb" "kg"
parcel_weight
required
number <double>
parcel_width
required
number <double>
recipient_city
required
string
recipient_country
required
string
recipient_full_name
required
string
recipient_phone
required
string
recipient_state
required
string
recipient_street_1
required
string
recipient_street_2
string
recipient_zip_code
required
string
sender_city
required
string
sender_country
required
string
sender_full_name
required
string
sender_phone
required
string
sender_state
required
string
sender_street_1
required
string
sender_street_2
string
sender_zip_code
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/shippo_shipping_rates

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "currency": "EUR",
  • "customs_certify": true,
  • "customs_certify_signer": "Joe Doe",
  • "customs_description": "T-Shirt",
  • "customs_incoterm": "DDU",
  • "customs_mass_unit": "lb",
  • "customs_net_weight": 5,
  • "customs_non_delivery_option": "return",
  • "customs_origin_country": "US",
  • "customs_quantity": 20,
  • "customs_value_amount": "200",
  • "customs_value_currency": "USD",
  • "parcel_distance_unit": "cm",
  • "parcel_height": 10,
  • "parcel_length": 10,
  • "parcel_mass_unit": "lb",
  • "parcel_weight": 10,
  • "parcel_width": 10,
  • "recipient_city": "New York",
  • "recipient_country": "us",
  • "recipient_full_name": "Ivan Horvat",
  • "recipient_phone": "123456789",
  • "recipient_state": "New York",
  • "recipient_street_1": "21-27 Marshall Court",
  • "recipient_zip_code": "90218",
  • "sender_city": "Altona",
  • "sender_country": "au",
  • "sender_full_name": "Ana Potter",
  • "sender_phone": "123456789",
  • "sender_state": "Victoria",
  • "sender_street_1": "21-27 Marshall Court"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "rates": [
    • {
      • "amount": "string",
      • "amount_local": "string",
      • "arrives_by": "string",
      • "attributes": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "currency": "string",
      • "currency_local": "string",
      • "duration_terms": "string",
      • "estimated_days": 0,
      • "id": "string",
      • "provider": "string",
      • "provider_image": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "shipment_id": "string"
}

Get the supported carriers

This returns the carriers that are currently supported for automated tracking in the online model. The carrier name should be shown to users but the code should be submitted to the /track endpoint when submitting tracking details. Likewise, when showing a transaction to the user, the carrier field stored with the transaction should be used to index these carriers and show the human-readable name of the carrier to the user, if this index is found.

Authorizations:
OAuth2APIKey

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/supported_carriers

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "code": "an-post",
    • "name": "An Post"
    },
  • {
    • "code": "fedex",
    • "name": "FedEx"
    },
  • {
    • "code": "ups",
    • "name": "UPS"
    },
  • {
    • "code": "usps",
    • "name": "USPS"
    }
]

Confirm delivery for this online transaction

This endpoint allows the buyer to manually confirm the delivery of the item in the case that the state of the transaction was not updated asynchronously by Trustap.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/confirm_delivery

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Confirm delivery for this online transaction

This endpoint allows the client to manually confirm the delivery on behalf of the guest buyer specified in the header as Trustap-User.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Trustap-User
string

Required in client flows, where you make API calls on behalf of another Trustap user.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/confirm_delivery_with_guest_buyer

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

required
carrier

string
city

string
delivery_center_code
required
string
delivery_type
required
string
Enum: "parcel_locker" "postal_office"
email
required
string
full_name
required
string
house_number

house_number_suffix
string
phone

street

Extend tracking details submission deadline for this online transaction

This endpoint allows the buyer to extend the tracking details submission deadline for the seller.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/extend_tracking_deadline

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Generate a shipment label for this online transaction's parcel

This endpoint returns a PDF containing the label for the transaction's parcel. Both sender and recipient details have to be submitted before making a call to this endpoint.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
query Parameters
carrier
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/generate_shipment_label

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "label": "string"
}

Send a customs declaration for this online transaction's shipment

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
certify
required
boolean
certify_signer
required
string
description
required
string
eel_pfc
string
incoterm
string
mass_unit
required
string
net_weight
required
number <double>
non_delivery_option
required
string
Enum: "return" "abandon"
origin_country
required
string
quantity
required
integer <int64>
value_amount
required
string
value_currency
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/shippo_customs_declaration

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "certify": true,
  • "certify_signer": "Joe Doe",
  • "description": "T-Shirt",
  • "incoterm": "DDU",
  • "mass_unit": "lb",
  • "net_weight": 5,
  • "non_delivery_option": "return",
  • "origin_country": "US",
  • "quantity": 20,
  • "value_amount": 200,
  • "value_currency": "USD"
}

Response samples

  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "negative_price",
  • "error": "`price` cannot be negative"
}

Set Shippo parcel details for this online transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
distance_unit
required
string (basic.DistanceUnit)
Enum: "in" "cm"
height
required
number <double>
length
required
number <double>
mass_unit
required
string (basic.DistanceUnit)
Enum: "in" "cm"
shipment_date
required
string

Date the shipment will be tendered to the carrier. Must be in the format 2014-01-18T00:35:03.463Z

weight
required
number <double>
width
required
number <double>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/shippo_parcel_details

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "distance_unit": "cm",
  • "height": 10,
  • "lenght": 10,
  • "mass_unit": "lb",
  • "weight": 10,
  • "width": 10
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "distance_unit": "string",
  • "height": 0.1,
  • "length": 0.1,
  • "mass_unit": "string",
  • "shipment_date": "string",
  • "weight": 0.1,
  • "width": 0.1
}

  • "tracking_code": "string",
  • "tracking_url": "string"
}

Set Shippo shipping rate for this online transaction

Set Shippo shipping rate for the transaction. This rate will be used to purchase the Shippo label once the transaction is paid. Shipment ID can be provided as an optional parameter, depending on the flow which is used to obtain it.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
rate_id
required
string
shipment_id
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/shippo_shipping_rate

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "rate_id": "d755e91036a84c15bd5318f4b67c7707"
}

Response samples

  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "negative_price",
  • "error": "`price` cannot be negative"
}

Get Shippo shipping rates based on the sender's and recipient's address and parcel details

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/shippo_shipping_rates

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "amount": "string",
    • "amount_local": "string",
    • "arrives_by": "string",
    • "attributes": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "currency": "string",
    • "currency_local": "string",
    • "duration_terms": "string",
    • "estimated_days": 0,
    • "id": "string",
    • "provider": "string",
    • "provider_image": "string"
    }
]

Set postal tracking details for this online transaction

After the tracking information has been submitted then the state of the transaction will be updated asynchronously by Trustap once the delivery of the item has been confirmed, at which point the delivered field of the transaction will be set. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the basic_tx:offline_track scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
carrier
required
string non-empty
tracking_code
required
string non-empty

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/track

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "carrier": "ups",
  • "tracking_code": "***"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Set postal tracking details for this online transaction

Add tracking details for the guest seller specified in the header as Trustap-User.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Trustap-User
string

Required in client flows, where you make API calls on behalf of another Trustap user.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
carrier
required
string non-empty
tracking_code
required
string non-empty

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/track_with_guest_seller

Online Cancel

Cancel this online transaction

Transaction can be cancelled until it's paid or if the feature RequireSellerAcceptance is present, it can be cancelled until it's tracked. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the basic_tx:offline_cancel scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/cancel

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Cancel this online transaction with a guest user

This endpoint cancels a transaction for the user specified in the header as Trustap-User. Transaction can be cancelled until it's paid or if the feature RequireSellerAcceptance is present, it can be cancelled until it's tracked.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
header Parameters
Trustap-User
string

Required in client flows, where you make API calls on behalf of another Trustap user.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/cancel_with_guest_user

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Cancel this listing-based transaction

"Listing transactions" are transactions created from listings (using the /create_transaction endpoints for listings). Listings transactions for online transactions must be accepted by the creator of the listing using /accept_listing_transaction in order to proceed. This endpoint instead rejects the listing transaction.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/reject_listing_transaction

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_seller": 0,
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "delivered": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-26T14:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "posta_hr_tracking": {
    • "barcode": "ABC12345",
    • "barcode_generated": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z"
    },
  • "price": 1234,
  • "quantity": 1,
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "status": "funds_released",
  • "tracked": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "tracking": {
    • "carrier": "ups",
    • "tracking_code": "***"
    }
}

Online Buyer/Seller Details

Get details of the buyer from this online transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/buyer_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": {
    • "first": "John",
    • "last": "Doe"
    },
  • "phone": "string"
}

Get details of the seller from this online transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/seller_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": {
    • "first": "John",
    • "last": "Doe"
    },
  • "phone": "string"
}

Get the Stripe client secret for this online transaction

This endpoint is used for the asynchronous payment flow using Stripe. The client_secret returned from this endpoint should be passed to stripe.confirmCardPayment to start the payment process.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/stripe_client_secret

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "client_secret": "string"
}

Get the details for the Stripe publishable key that is in use for this online transaction

Returns the Publishable Key for the Stripe Platform which is hosting this transaction.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}/stripe_publishable_key

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "publishable_key": "pk_xXxXxXxXxXx"
}

F2F Transactions

F2F2 transactions are used when the goods are delivered in person.

Get multiple face-to-face transactions by their IDs

This endpoint takes a required ids parameter that contains a comma-separated list of transaction IDs, and returns the transactions corresponding to those IDs. A maximum of 50 IDs may be provided, and results are returned in the order specified in ids, and duplicates are preserved. Transactions that couldn't be found will be returned as null values in the result array. The following example request results in the 200 OK response described below, assuming that the transaction with ID 1990 couldn't be found:

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/batch/transactions?ids=1309,609,1990,609
Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
ids
required
string

A comma-separated list of transaction IDs

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/batch/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
    • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
    • "client_id": "trustap-app",
    • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
    • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
    • "deposit_pricing": {
      • "charge": 78,
      • "price": 1234
      },
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
    • "id": 1309,
    • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
    • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
    • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
    • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
    • "pricing": {
      • "charge": 190,
      • "price": 5000
      },
    • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
    • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
    • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "skip_remainder": false,
    • "status": "funds_released"
    }
]

Get face-to-face transactions for the logged-in user

Transactions are currently sorted by ID.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
before_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return transactions that were created chronologically before the transaction with this ID

after_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return transactions that were created chronologically after the transaction with this ID (i.e. with smaller IDs)

limit
integer <int64> [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25

The maximum number of transactions to return

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/me/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
    • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
    • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
    • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
    • "deposit_pricing": {
      • "charge": 78,
      • "price": 1234
      },
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
    • "id": 1309,
    • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
    • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
    • "pricing": {
      • "charge": 190,
      • "price": 5000
      },
    • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
    • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
    • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "skip_remainder": false,
    • "status": "funds_released"
    },
  • {
    • "buyer_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
    • "created": "2018-12-25T09:00:00Z",
    • "currency": "eur",
    • "deposit_pricing": {
      • "charge": 78,
      • "price": 1234
      },
    • "description": "Soccer ticket",
    • "id": 609,
    • "join_code": "c9cd6a9d-1096-4d38-b4aa-2c354beac845",
    • "skip_remainder": false,
    • "status": "created"
    }
]

Create a new face-to-face transaction

Note that this endpoint is similar to POST /me/transactions but takes deposit_price and deposit_charge fields instead of the price and charge fields. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>
client_id
string
currency
required
string (Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
deposit_charge
required
integer <int64>
deposit_charge_seller
integer <int64>
deposit_price
required
integer <int64>
description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

role
required
string (basic.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"
skip_remainder
boolean

If skip_remainder is true then this transaction will move to the "confirm handover" step after the deposit has been accepted.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/me/transactions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge_calculator_version": 2,
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_charge": 78,
  • "deposit_price": 1234,
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "role": "seller"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Create a new face-to-face transaction with both users

This endpoint is an optimised call that allows a transaction to be created and joined in a single request. It requires the user identified by join_user_id to have granted the p2p_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request.

Note that this endpoint is similar to POST /me/transactions but takes deposit_price and deposit_charge fields instead of the price and charge fields.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>
creator_role
required
string (p2p.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"
currency
required
string (Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
deposit_charge
required
integer <int64>
deposit_charge_seller
required
integer <int64>
deposit_fee_multiplier
number <double>

The fee_multiplier parameter is used to apply a higher percentage fee based on the total price of the transaction. The percentage fee is calculated multiplying the percentage fee by the fee_multiplier.

deposit_price
required
integer <int64>
description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

join_user_id
required
string

The user that will be joined to the new transaction when it is created. It cannot be the ID of the user making the request.

skip_remainder
boolean

If skip_remainder is true then the transaction will move to the "confirm handover" step after the deposit has been accepted.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/me/transactions/create_and_join

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "client_id": "test-auth",
  • "creator_role": "seller",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_charge": 118,
  • "deposit_charge_seller": 0,
  • "deposit_price": 1234,
  • "description": "Little Fish",
  • "join_user_id": "2-8ab12191-7508-4efe-b65e-51d1bc440ed9"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Create a new face-to-face transaction with both users

This endpoint is an optimised call that allows a transaction to be created and joined in a single request. It requires the online user to have granted the p2p_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request. This endpoint allows creating a transaction with both buyer and seller as guest users, or one party to be guest user and the other full user.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
Request Body schema: application/json
required
buyer_id
required
string

The id of the buyer for this transaction (it can be full user id or guest user id).

charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>
creator_role
required
string (p2p.Role)
Enum: "buyer" "seller"
currency
required
string (p2p.Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
deposit_charge
required
integer <int64>
deposit_charge_seller
integer <int64>
deposit_fee_multiplier
number <double>

The fee_multiplier parameter is used to apply a higher percentage fee based on the total price of the transaction. The percentage fee is calculated multiplying the percentage fee by the fee_multiplier.

deposit_price
required
integer <int64>
description
required
string

A description of the goods being sold.

seller_id
required
string

The id of the seller for this transaction (it can be full user id or guest user id).

skip_remainder
boolean

If skip_remainder is true then the transaction will move to the "confirm handover" step after the deposit has been accepted.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/me/transactions/create_with_guest_user

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_id": "1-ef9664e4-921a-4696-8eaa-d8b2593d9ff9",
  • "charge_calculator_version": 3,
  • "creator_role": "seller",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_charge": 118,
  • "deposit_charge_seller": 0,
  • "deposit_price": 1234,
  • "description": "Little Fish",
  • "seller_id": "1-f40b6944-3c54-405e-9ae3-3fa9d2be9f91",
  • "skip_remainder": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Get a face-to-face transaction by its ID

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Claim F2F transaction for the seller

This endpoint allows a client to claim transactions for seller. It requires to have granted the p2p_tx:offline_claim scope and API Key authentication. The endpoint is not accessible for guests and full users.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/claim_for_seller

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },

  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

OAuth2
path Parameters
secret
required
string

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions_by_claim_secret/{secret}/claim_as_buyer
