Join a face-to-face transaction by its join code

This endpoint allows a user to join a transaction provided a join code. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_create_join scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
joinCode
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions_by_join_code/{joinCode}/join

F2F Payment

Payment endpoints for face-to-face transactions.

Get the Trustap fee for a face-to-face transaction

This returns the Trustap fee, in the currency's smallest unit, for a transaction involving goods with the supplied price. See the Stripe documentation for more details.

Authorizations:
OAuth2APIKey
query Parameters
currency
required
string

The currency that the price is specified in.

price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold in this transaction, in the currency's smallest unit. For example, if a trading card is being sold for $12.34 (with currency as usd), then the request for the charge for this transaction would be /p2p/charge?price=1234&currency=usd.

fee_multiplier
number <double>

The fee_multiplier parameter is used to apply a higher percentage fee based on the total price of the transaction. The percentage fee is calculated multiplying the percentage fee by the fee_multiplier.

quantity
integer <int64>

When creating transactions from a multi-use listing, the quantity parameter can be provided in order to generate a charge for the given price multiplied by the given quantity. See /p2p/multi_use_listings/{listingId}/create_transaction for more details.

payment_method
string

The payment method that will be used to pay for the transaction. This is necessary because different payment methods may result in different fees.

The default value is card.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/charge

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 78,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 5,
  • "currency": "eur"
}

Update the description, currency, price and/or charge of this face-to-face transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
currency
string (Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
deposit_charge
integer <int64>
deposit_price
integer <int64>
description
string

A description of the goods being sold.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_charge": 78,
  • "deposit_price": 1234,
  • "description": "Soccer ticket"
}

    • "charge": 78,

    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",

Get the bank transfer details for a face-to-face transaction which payment method is `bank_transfer`

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/bank_transfer_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "amount": 0,
  • "currency": "string",
  • "financial_address": {
    • "aba": {
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_name": "string",
      • "routing_number": "string"
      },
    • "iban": {
      • "account_holder_name": "string",
      • "bic": "string",
      • "country": "string",
      • "iban": "string"
      },
    • "sort_code": {
      • "account_holder_name": "string",
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "sort_code": "string"
      },
    • "swift": {
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_name": "string",
      • "swift_code": "string"
      }
    },
  • "hosted_instructions_url": "string",
  • "reference": "string"
}

Set deposit payment method for this face-to-face transaction

Set deposit payment method for face-to-face transaction. Values can be card, bank_transfer, p24, sepa and fpx.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
currency
required
string
deposit_charge
required
integer <int64>
deposit_charge_seller
required
integer <int64>
deposit_price
required
integer <int64>
payment_method
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/set_deposit_payment_method

Accept the deposit for this face-to-face transaction

Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_accept_deposit scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/accept_deposit

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Set the total price for this face-to-face transaction

price is the total price of the item, and thus includes the price already paid for the deposit.

Note that this endpoint will return a remainder_too_low response if the difference between the total price and the deposit price is too low. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_set_price scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
charge
required
integer <int64>

The charge value returned from a request to /p2p/charge.

charge_calculator_version
required
integer <int64>

The charge_calculator_version value returned from a request to /p2p/charge.

currency
required
string (Currency)
Enum: "aud" "eur" "gbp" "myr" "pln" "sek" "usd" "huf"
price
required
integer <int64>

The price of the goods being sold, in the currency's smallest unit. The charge value should correspond to the Trustap charge created with this price, otherwise this request will fail with a 400 error.

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/set_price

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "charge": 190,
  • "charge_calculator_version": 2,
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "price": 5000
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Skip the remainder for this face-to-face transaction

This will skip the remainder payment of this transaction, and the total price of the transaction will not need to be set. Note that this must be done before the total price of the transaction is set using /set_price.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/skip_remainder

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

F2F Handover

Handover endpoints for face-to-face transactions.

Confirm the handover for this face-to-face transaction

Both parties should confirm the handover for a face-to-face transaction. The complaints period begins when the seller confirms the handover. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_confirm_handover scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/confirm_handover

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Confirm the handover for this face-to-face transaction with a guest user

Both parties should confirm the handover for a face-to-face transaction. Full users don't have access to this endpoint.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/confirm_handover_with_guest_user

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",

    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",

    • "charge": 190,

    },

  • "status": "funds_released"
}

F2F Complaint

Complaint endpoints for face-to-face transactions.

Accept a complaint for this face-to-face transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/accept_complaint

  • 200
Content type
application/json

  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Submit a complaint for this face-to-face transaction

Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_complain scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
description
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/complain

Content type
application/json

  • "description": "Item was fake"

integer <int64>

  • "status": "funds_released"
}

F2F Cancel

Cancel endpoints for face-to-face transactions.

Cancel this face-to-face transaction with a description

If a transaction is cancelled after the deposit has been paid then the deposit (excluding the Trustap fee) will be returned to the buyer. Offline access is allowed for this endpoint when the user has granted the p2p_tx:offline_cancel scope to the client that is performing the request.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
description
required
string

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/cancel_with_description

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "description": "Found another buyer"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_pricing": {
    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },
  • "description": "Soccer ticket",
  • "funds_released": "2019-12-25T17:00:00Z",
  • "id": 1309,
  • "is_deposit_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "is_remainder_payment_in_progress": false,
  • "joined": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "priced": "2019-12-25T13:00:00Z",
  • "pricing": {
    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

Cancel this face-to-face transaction with a description with guest user

If a transaction is cancelled after the deposit has been paid then the deposit (excluding the Trustap fee) will be returned to the buyer.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
description
required
string non-empty

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/cancel_with_description_with_guest_user

Content type
application/json
{
  • "description": "Found another buyer"
}

Content type
application/json
{
  • "buyer_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T16:00:00Z",
  • "buyer_id": "feb33a87-3917-4538-9260-127c8a6b5232",
  • "client_id": "trustap-app",
  • "created": "2019-12-25T09:00:00Z",
  • "currency": "eur",
  • "deposit_accepted": "2019-12-25T12:00:00Z",
  • "deposit_paid": "2019-12-25T11:00:00Z",

    • "charge": 78,
    • "price": 1234
    },

    • "charge": 190,
    • "price": 5000
    },
  • "remainder_paid": "2019-12-25T14:00:00Z",
  • "seller_handover_confirmed": "2019-12-25T15:00:00Z",
  • "seller_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7",
  • "skip_remainder": false,
  • "status": "funds_released"
}

F2F Buyer/Seller Details

User details endpoints for face-to-face transactions.

Get the Stripe client secret for this face-to-face transaction

This endpoint is used for the asynchronous payment flow using Stripe. The client_secret returned from this endpoint should be passed to stripe.confirmCardPayment to start the payment process.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/remainder_stripe_client_secret

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "client_secret": "***"
}

Get the details for the Stripe publishable key that is in use for this face-to-face transaction

Returns the Publishable Key for the Stripe Platform which is hosting this transaction.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transaction_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transaction_id}/stripe_publishable_key

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "publishable_key": "pk_xXxXxXxXxXx"
}

Get the details of the buyer from this face-to-face transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/buyer_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": {
    • "first": "John",
    • "last": "Doe"
    },
  • "phone": "string"
}

Get the Stripe client secret for this face-to-face transaction

This endpoint is used for the asynchronous payment flow using Stripe. The client_secret returned from this endpoint should be passed to stripe.confirmCardPayment to start the payment process.

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/deposit_stripe_client_secret

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "client_secret": "***"
}

Get the details of the seller from this face-to-face transaction

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
transactionId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/p2p/transactions/{transactionId}/seller_details

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": {
    • "first": "John",
    • "last": "Doe"
    },
  • "phone": "string"
}

Notifications

Notifications log updates for users.

Get the notifications for the logged-in user

Authorizations:
OAuth2
query Parameters
before_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return transactions that were created chronologically before the transaction with this ID

after_id
integer <int64> >= 0

Only return notifications that were created chronologically after the notification with this ID (i.e. with smaller IDs)

limit
integer <int64> [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25

The maximum number of notifications to return

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/me/notifications

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "created": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
    • "description": "Buyer has joined transaction for 'Soccer ticket'",
    • "id": 1990,
    • "target": "basic/1309",
    • "user_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7"
    }
]

Get a notification by its ID

Authorizations:
OAuth2
path Parameters
notification_id
required
integer <int64>

Responses

https://dev.stage.trustap.com/api/v1/notifications/{notification_id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created": "2019-12-25T10:00:00Z",
  • "description": "Buyer has joined transaction for 'Soccer ticket'",
  • "id": 1990,
  • "target": "basic/1309",
  • "user_id": "ad5bb99f-85bf-47e1-be0d-15e7541c6ad7"
}
